title: .filling.protect
body:
CC: ________
Medical history reviewed.
No underlying disease
No history of drug allergy
No current medication
Clinical findings:
- Tooth ____
- Percussion: ____
- Pulp test: ____
- Soft tissue: ____
Diagnosis: ________
Diagnosis, treatment options, benefits, risks, possible complications, prognosis and alternative treatment explained to patient. Possible postoperative pain/sensitivity and need for further treatment including RCT explained. Patient understood and informed consent obtained.
Verified patient identity and correct tooth prior to procedure.
Procedure:
- Aseptic technique maintained
- Isolation by gauze roll
- Caries removal completed
- Cavity preparation completed
- Restored with Composite (A3.5B : Z350XT)
- Occlusion checked and adjusted
- Proximal contact point checked
Patient tolerated procedure well.
Complication: ________
Postoperative instruction given including possible postoperative sensitivity/pain and indication for return visit.
Plan: ________

title: .scaling.protect
body:
CC: ____
Medical history reviewed.
No underlying disease
Drug allergy: ____
No current medication
Clinical findings:
- Generalized supra/subgingival calculus
- Gingival inflammation: ____
- Bleeding on probing: ____
- Pocket depth: ____
- Oral hygiene: ____
Diagnosis: ____
Procedure, benefits, risks and possible postoperative sensitivity/bleeding explained. Oral hygiene status and periodontal condition discussed. Informed consent obtained.
Verified patient identity before procedure.
Procedure:
- Piezoelectric scaling
- Polishing with prophylaxis
- Oral hygiene instruction given
Aseptic technique maintained throughout procedure.
Patient tolerated procedure well.
Complication:____
Postoperative instruction given.
Plan: ____

title: .extraction.protect
body:
CC: ________
Medical history reviewed.
No underlying disease
Drug allergy: ____
No current medication
Clinical findings:
- Tooth ____
- Mobility: ____
- Swelling: ____
- Tenderness/percussion: ____
Radiographic findings: ____
Diagnosis: ____
Diagnosis, treatment indication, treatment options, benefits, risks and possible complications explained including pain, swelling, bleeding, root fracture, dry socket, infection, oroantral communication, nerve injury and need for surgical extraction if indicated. Alternative treatment explained. Patient understood and informed consent obtained.
Verified patient identity and correct tooth/site before extraction.
Treatment:
- Aseptic technique maintained
- LA 4% Articaine + 1:100,000 epinephrine 1 cartidge
- Extraction tooth ____ completed using elevator/forceps
- Hemostasis achieved by biting pressure gauze pack/suture
Patient tolerated procedure well.
Complication: ____
Medication: ____
Postoperative instruction given including bleeding control, diet instruction, smoking restriction and indication for emergency return.
Plan: ____

title: .pedo.protect
body:
Child accompanied by parent/guardian.
Medical history reviewed.
No underlying disease
No history of drug allergy
Behavior: ________
Clinical findings: ________
Diagnosis: ________
Diagnosis, treatment options, benefits, risks, prognosis and behavior management explained to parent/guardian. Possible complications explained. Informed consent obtained from parent/guardian.
Verified patient identity and correct tooth before procedure.
Treatment: ________
Behavior guidance technique:
- Tell-show-do
- Positive reinforcement
- Voice control/non-pharmacological behavior guidance
Patient tolerated procedure fairly/well.
Complication: ________
Post-op/OHI/diet instruction explained to parent/guardian.
Plan: ________

title: .consent.protect
body: Diagnosis, treatment indication, treatment options, benefits, risks, prognosis, possible complications and alternative treatment explained. Patient had opportunity to ask questions, understood information provided and informed consent obtained.

title: .verify.protect
body: Patient identity, treatment procedure and correct tooth/site verified prior to procedure.

title: .risk
body: Medical condition and current medication reviewed. No contraindication for planned dental treatment at this visit.

title: .comp
body: Complication explained to patient. Condition monitored and managed appropriately. Postoperative warning signs explained.

title: .postext.protect
body: Postoperative instruction given regarding bleeding control, pain/swelling management, diet, oral hygiene and indication for emergency return including prolonged bleeding, severe pain, swelling or fever.

title: .refuse
body: Diagnosis and recommended treatment explained including possible consequence of delayed/no treatment. Patient refused treatment at this visit and acknowledged understanding of possible risks and complications.

title: .refer.protect
body: Condition and treatment limitation explained to patient. Referred for further evaluation/treatment due to ________.

title: .highrisk
body: High-risk medical condition reviewed. Risks related to dental treatment discussed with patient. Treatment performed with caution and patient monitored throughout procedure.
